posts.author: I-am-Orlando
posts.title:
Asked point blank if there's a 10-20% chance AI wipes out humanity, Elon Musk says that the answer is basically yes. 

The reasoning is that AI and robotics progress now moves on its own, nobody can stop it even if they wanted to, so his personal stance is just to enjoy the ride.

twitter.content:
